product_overview: A comprehensive web-based survey system targeted at educational institutions, facilitating role-based access for Students, Teachers, and Administrators, enhanced with AI-powered analytics and modern responsive design.
core_goals: Provide secure and robust user authentication and session management for all users.
Enable role-based access control delivering tailored interfaces for students, teachers, and administrators.
Leverage AI technologies to offer intelligent survey analytics and interactive chat for querying survey data.
Offer comprehensive survey management, user management, and reporting capabilities through the admin dashboard.
Ensure responsive and user-friendly design using Bootstrap 5 that works seamlessly across devices.
Support data visualization with real-time dashboards displaying interactive charts and statistics.
key_features: Role-Based Access Control with separate portals for Students, Teachers, and Administrators.
AI-Powered Analytics integrating Grok and DeepSeek APIs for deep insights on survey results.
Secure User Authentication with login, registration, and session handling.
Admin Dashboard providing management of users, surveys, complaints, and system settings.
Student and Teacher Portals supporting survey taking, creation, analytics viewing, and profile management.
AI Chat Interface allowing natural language queries against survey data.
Built-in Markdown Viewer for system documentation and help materials.
RESTful API endpoints supporting core functionalities like training data and markdown reading.
Data Visualization with charts, graphs, exportable reports, and real-time statistics display.
Comprehensive testing suites including unit, integration, and manual tests for reliability.
user_flow_summary: Users register or login through the public login and registration pages with secure authentication.
Depending on role, users access their respective dashboards: Admin, Student, or Teacher portals.
Admins manage users, surveys, complaints, and system settings within the Admin Dashboard.
Teachers create, edit, and analyze surveys via the Teacher Portal.
Students participate in surveys, view analytics, and manage their profiles in the Student Portal.
Users can interact with AI-powered chat interface for querying survey insights in natural language.
Documentation can be accessed through built-in markdown viewers via public or internal pages.
APIs provide programmatic access to various system capabilities for integration or extended functionality.
validation_criteria: User authentication process must securely handle login, registration, and session management without vulnerabilities.
Role-based access control restricts user operations and UI elements according to user roles (Admin, Teacher, Student).
AI analytics produce accurate and meaningful insights integrated smoothly into user dashboards.
Admin dashboard functions must allow full management capabilities with responsive and error-free UI.
Surveys created by teachers must be saved properly and accessible to students for completion.
All portals maintain consistency in user experience and visual design with responsive layouts.
API endpoints respond correctly with expected data formats and handle error conditions gracefully.
All new features and fixes pass unit, integration, and manual test suites before deployment.
System documentation is complete, up-to-date, and accessible through markdown viewers in the application.
